emails.subject: RE: Enron Global Markets
emails.body: Gentlemen: I interviewed Adrian back in the fall. I made him an offer to join my group, but he elected to go to EES. He is a hard-working bright individual who comes well-recommended. I told him at the time, he would be welcome on his next rotation. I am still waiting to hear on this. Jen
